payload.input_str:
{'sql': "SELECT DISTINCT s.Fname, s.Age
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'dog'
)
AND s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);"}

final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Fname, s.Age
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'dog'
)
AND s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);
final.answer_text: The only student who has a dog but no cat as a pet is Tracy, aged 19.
